posts.author: PP1
posts.community: IDFC First Bank Limited - First Bank Preference for Long Term Investors too?
posts.text: image 1091×795 111 KB Q1 FY27 provisional numbers are here. Deposits grew by 5.9% QoQ (26% annualized). CASA grew by 8.1% QoQ (36.5% annualized). There were fears that IDFC bank will find it hard to raise deposits post the recent fraud incident. Well, those fears have been dispelled by these strong numbers.

posts.author: Nitin_Nimkar
posts.community: IDFC First Bank Limited - First Bank Preference for Long Term Investors too?
posts.text: Major Indian banks collectively spent over ₹2,700 crore on printing and stationery. Despite digitization, large volumes of physical passbooks, KYC forms, and deposit slips drive massive paper costs. The State Bank of India (SBI) alone spent ₹986 crore, amounting to ₹2.7 crore daily. A recent analysis highlighted the massive scale of these administrative and operational costs across the sector. State Bank of India (SBI): ₹986 crore (approx. 1.22% of net profit) HDFC Bank: ₹922 crore ICICI Bank: ₹274 crore Axis Bank: ₹226 crore IDFC First Bank: ₹123 crore (accounting for a notable 8.05% of its n…
